title: Material Compatibility Record
description: Schema for a material-to-material compatibility record. Captures pairwise compatibility assessment between two materials based on published evidence.

record_id.description: Unique identifier for this compatibility record.

material_a_ref.description: Reference to the first material ID.

material_b_ref.description: Reference to the second material ID.

conditions.description: Required conditions for conditional compatibility (e.g., separator sheet, primer application).

evidence_refs.description: References to evidence sources supporting this compatibility result.

chemistry_ref.description: Pointer to Chemistry Kernel record explaining interaction mechanism.
